description_long: This airplane features a sleek, angular design with a predominantly dark metallic body accented by gold highlights. The wings are sharply swept back and integrated into the fuselage, giving it a futuristic and aggressive appearance. Twin large engine nacelles are mounted under each wing, with prominent exhaust nozzles visible at the rear. The nose is sharply pointed, and the cockpit is centrally located with a streamlined canopy, suggesting a single-pilot configuration. The tail section is compact, with a pair of vertical stabilizers and no visible horizontal stabilizer, contributing to its unique silhouette. The surface finish appears hard and metallic, with a matte sheen and minimal surface texture.
description: A futuristic, angular airplane with swept-back wings, twin underwing engines, and a dark metallic body accented by gold. Features a pointed nose and a compact, dual-vertical stabilizer tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sharply swept wings, large underwing engines, and pointed nose; gold accents are prominent along the fuselage and wing edges.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the aggressive, angular nose, wide stance of the engines, and the cockpit canopy centered above the fuselage.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the engine nacelles, gold striping, and the compact tail section.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin engine exhausts, dual vertical stabilizers, and the streamlined, narrow fuselage tapering towards the tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and no visible winglets; wings are integrated into the fuselage with a slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under the wings, with large rear exhaust nozzles visible.
attribute_tail_design: Dual vertical stabilizers in a V-tail configuration, with no visible horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear, with main gear likely under the wings and a nose gear, though not visibly extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a streamlined canopy integrated into the fuselage.
